name: Robert Half Inc.

profile.description: Robert Half Inc. is a global staffing and consulting firm specializing in finance, technology, legal, and administrative placement with 14,500 employees.

innovation.label: DEVELOPING
innovation.analysis: Track Record (1/3): Revenue declined 5.8% YoY in a challenging staffing market. AI Deployment (1/2): Deploying AI for candidate matching and placement optimization [1]. Market Share (1/2): Leading specialized staffing firm but market share is fragmenting. Pipeline (0/2): No significant pipeline. R&D Intensity (1/1): Above-average tech investment for staffing [1].

inspiration.label: DEVELOPING
inspiration.analysis: Mission Floor (2/4): Clear talent matching mission. Community Impact (1/2): 14,500 employees across communities. Retention (0/2): No data. Insider Buying (1/2): Some alignment [1].

infrastructure.label: DEVELOPING
infrastructure.analysis: RHI shows modest financials. Forward P/E of 10.45 is attractive, but profit margin of 2.5% is very low [1]. ROE of 10.0% below target. D/E of 19.2% is conservative. Revenue declined 5.8%. Dividend yield of 9.8% is very high with 177.4% payout ratio — sustainability concern [1].

ai_resilience.label: HIGH RISK
ai_resilience.analysis: AI Risk Protection (4/9): Staffing is directly exposed to AI disruption — AI hiring tools, automated screening, and AI agents handling professional tasks could reduce demand for temporary staffing [1]. Professional services like accounting and legal temp work face AI substitution risk. AI Opportunity (0/1): No AI revenue [1].

infinite_game.summary: Robert Half has a 70+ year history demonstrating long-term endurance but faces AI-driven existential questions about the staffing model.

investment_thesis: RHI offers a 9.8% dividend yield with forward P/E of 10.45, but the payout ratio of 177.4% is unsustainable [1].
thesis_continued: Revenue declining 5.8% with earnings down 39.7% and direct AI disruption risk to the staffing model make this a high-risk value trap [1].
sources: Yahoo Finance / yfinance data for RHI (Robert Half), retrieved April 2026
